hero.name: Your Name
hero.description: I build things for the web.

about.title: About Me
content: I'm a passionate developer with experience in building web applications.
I love creating clean, user-friendly experiences that solve real problems.
When I'm not coding, you can find me reading, hiking, or experimenting with new technologies.

projects.title: NPM material-mui-date-range-picker
description: - Published as an NPM package for reusable date selection in React applications.

projects.title: Infinite Dad Jokes
description: - Based app for displaying infinite dad jokes.
- Integrated with TypeScript, Webpack, ESLint, and Jest for a robust development setup.

projects.title: Plugin for projects using ngx-translate package
description: - Developed a VSCode plugin to enhance workflows for Angular projects.
- Focused on utilities for the ngx-translate package.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: I'm currently looking for new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll do my best to get back to you!
